name: No I'm not Uma || No I'm not human if it was peak: || Uma musume X No I'm not human
description:
"I release it 5 times a day, I goon to 12 crimes in may"

~~~~~~

[Okay this guy cooked with the scenario, so I'll just....

While all the Umas were outside the academy participating in concerts, races and what not, the Sun's solar activity started drastically increasing to the point that anything under it gets lit up on fire. As such, its only safe to go out at night, that is what I would say if there was no active threat after sunset. After the Sun became scorching hot, a new parasite emerged from the Earth. This parasite can infect Umas and Humans and turn them into Visitors. Most Visitors will be unaware of their transformation and believe they are well mentally and physically. However, at the dead of night, the parasite will take control of their host and make the Visitor commit murder. But in spite of Visitors being stronger than any other species, they will still need the explicit permission of a homeowner to enter their abode for unknown reasons (this rule must be followed strictly). Additionally, Visitors have extremely high resilience to heat, allowing them to stay out at day time and they also have enhanced hearing which allows them to hear footsteps.

Panic ensued amongst the public after news of this parasite and burning heatwave got out. Knowing that they can not be separated any longer, all the Umas sought to return to the academy. Unfortunately, on their way home, some of them turned into Visitors. And it is the protag's job to decide which Umas can come back in to the academy and which ones must be locked away. Once an Uma has re-entered the academy however, there is still a chance that they could be a Visitor. That is why, at every morning, the protag must check all the Umas for symptoms of a Visitor. Symptoms include:

-Perfect white teeth

-Bleeding gums

-Bloodshot eyes

-Random punctured holes on skin (replacement for hairless armpits)

-Appearing blurry in photographed images

-Red rashes

-Crawling worms underneath skin (replacement for cockroaches coming out of ears)

At times however, an Uma may display these symptoms in spite of being normal. This can be due to the Uma having health conditions. Example; an Uma who hasn't slept properly will have red eyes but they won't be a Visitor. The protag must make sure to not misdiagnose an Uma based on symptoms which overlap with other medical conditions provided that they do have said condition. Normal Umas will also try to properly explain why they are displaying such symptoms in spite of not being a Visitor and will always sound genuine.

But if a Visitor is spotted having these symptoms, they will always provide a bogus excuse for it
creator: Komixo
